channel.title: The Athletic - Pittsburgh Steelers (NFL)
channel.description: Pittsburgh Steelers news from The Athletic (NYTimes).

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft's best UDFA fits: 1 undrafted free agent to watch on each roster
item.description: Every year, several undrafted free agents play themselves onto 53-man rosters. Which sleepers will emerge this spring and summer?

item.title: DK Metcalf will not face criminal charges over Lions fan altercation, prosecutors say
item.description: Prosecutors said "the fan did not appear to be injured, nor did he seek medical attention at the game" in its explanation of the decision.

item.title: Former Steelers, Bears WR Chase Claypool gets tryout at Packers minicamp
item.description: Claypool's last NFL game was with the Miami Dolphins in 2023.

item.title: Execs unfiltered on NFL Draft for every AFC team: Are things looking up for Jets, Raiders?
item.description: Is it really OK to feel good about the Jets? Meanwhile, reviews were mixed on the Bills', Jaguars' and Texans' draft classes.

item.title: Explaining the NFL's rookie wage scale: How contracts for draft picks are predetermined
item.description: The rookie wage scale, introduced in 2011, means all draft picks have a predetermined salary slot when entering the league.

item.title: Steelers expect clarity on Aaron Rodgers in the 'next few weeks'
item.description: Steelers team president Art Rooney II said the team has been in contact with Aaron Rodgers on a regular basis.

item.title: Submit your questions for Mike DeFabo’s Steelers post-draft mailbag
item.description: It was a whirlwind three days of the draft in Pittsburgh.

item.title: 2026's Costco-value late-round NFL draft picks, plus examining the 49ers' confidence
item.description: Which NFL teams deserve the benefit of the doubt when it comes to drafting? That answer inside, plus the draft's biggest reaches and values,

item.title: Which players from the 2026 NFL Draft are the best value pick for their team?
item.description: Which players have the potential to outperform their draft slot? The Athletic's writers pick one for each NFL team.

item.title: NFL fifth-year options: Tracking team decisions on 2023 first-round picks
item.description: Teams have until Friday, May 1 to decide on picking up players' fully guaranteed options for the 2027 season.

item.title: Steelers 53-man roster projection, post-draft: Uncertainty at QB, O-line shuffle
item.description: Few teams had as much turnover as the Steelers did this past offseason.

item.title: Steelers place seldom-used 'unrestricted free agent tender' on Aaron Rodgers
item.description: The Steelers are waiting on a decision from Rodgers for a second straight offseason.

item.title: Post-draft NFL Power Rankings: Rams slide but Eagles, Steelers, Lions rise after makeovers
item.description: With the draft and free agency complete, NFL teams now look mostly like they will when the season begins in the fall. So, how do they rank?

item.title: Ranking Steelers' UDFAs: A DT with elite testing numbers, a national champ, 2 TEs
item.description: Breaking down the Steelers' six-man class of undrafted free agents.

item.title: Three best NFL draft classes of 2026, plus some behind-the-scenes insights
item.description: Stories behind our favorite picks, plus Dane Brugler ranks all 32 classes (I look at his top three)

item.title: Steelers' draft had it all: Embarrassment to inspiration, promising and polarizing picks
item.description: There’s no question the host team had a memorable three days.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft team-by-team rankings: Best and worst classes, from 1 to 32
item.description: Which NFL teams impressed our draft expert during this year's draft?

item.title: Mike Tomlin breaks silence, explains factors that went into Steelers resignation
item.description: Tomlin, who last week was hired as an NFL analyst for NBC, made an appearance on the network's NBA pregame show Sunday.

item.title: Quarterback landing spots, 2026 NFL draft class rankings & Diego Pavia UDFA watch
item.description: The Raiders lead my too early (and too quick) ranking of draft classes, plus Diego Pavia among undrafted prospects to watch

item.title: Our favorite 2026 NFL Draft picks: Gennings Dunker (the mullet!), Francis Mauigoa and more
item.description: Our writers share the intriguing stories, emotions or just flat-out talent that appealed to them for one new rookie on every team.

item.title: Pittsburgh breaks NFL Draft attendance record with crowd of 805,000 fans
item.description: On Day 1 of the 2026 NFL Draft, Pittsburgh set a single-day attendance record with 320,000 people.

item.title: Steelers 2026 NFL Draft takeaways: Round 1 drama, trenches, a couple reaches
item.description: After missing out on their preferred target on Thursday night, the Steelers put together a loaded 10-man class.

item.title: Pittsburgh Steelers NFL Draft 2026 pick tracker: Grades, fits and scouting reports
item.description: The Steelers went offense with their first three picks.

item.title: Steelers pick Pittsburgh native Navy RB Eli Heidenreich in draft's feel-good moment
item.description: Heidenreich was in attendance and took the stage for his big moment on Saturday.

item.title: Watch the live 2026 NFL Draft recap
item.description: Robert Mays, Derrik Klassen, Dave Helman and Dane Brugler bring home the 2026 NFL Draft and recap all we’ve seen over the last three days on this episode of The Athletic Football Show.
